text: I just checked my account and saw a fee for my card payment. Why was I charged? It doesn't make sense, can someone explain?

I noticed a charge on my statement that I don't recall making. I mean, I've checked and double-checked, but nothing rings a bell. Can you help me figure out what this is about? It seems like there might have been a mistake or something. I just want to make sure that I'm not missing anything or that it wasn't a payment I accidentally overlooked. This is really confusing!
I regret to inform you that my card has been stuck in the ATM, and I require assistance with retrieving it.
I tried to buy something but it says my payment was declined? I just got my card! This can't be right.

Hi there, I'm in a bit of a panic right now because I can't find my card anywhere! I was out shopping yesterday and I think I might have left it at the store, but I can’t remember which one it was, and I’m really worried someone might misuse my card. Can you help me with what to do next? I know I should probably block it, but I’m not sure how to go about that. Thanks!
Hey, so I made a payment last week and it still hasn't shown up in my account? What's going on?
